Fig. 2: Perplexity (PPL) distribution of grounding results on ScreenSpot-Pro. We compare the PPL across multiple models, with green and red areas indicating correct and incorrect grounding predictions, respectively. Higher PPL values for incorrect results suggest a strong correlation between model uncertainty and grounding failure.
